meaning: n.淫荡的目光,恶意的目光vi.送秋波,斜视
examples: Her father gave a lazy leer.
So we had to spend the night in Leer!
He raised it to his lips with a leer.
Para leer acerca de lo ocurrido en la Asamblea, por favor abra el attachment.
Ms Leer-Greenberg told a judge her client was "profoundly, medically impaired and in need of medical attention".
